implementation.note: t090_distillation.rs and train_data.rs are untouched. train_patterns_v3.rs gained a --simple-corpus / --simple-max-records mode (new schema=2-simple identity namespace) plus a pure code-motion refactor (run_config_seed) extracting the existing per-(config,seed) training loop unchanged so both the WTHOR default path and the new simple-corpus path share it.

defaultPathInvarianceCheck.method: ran `--configs v2 --seeds 1 --epochs 1 --max-games 20` before and after the refactor

implementation.holdoutScheme: split_by_position_hash: fnv1a hash of the D4-canonicalized position key (experiment::canonicalize), hash % 10 == 9 -> frozen (~10% nominal, ~12.5% observed on Egaroucid data), else train. Canonicalizing before hashing keeps symmetric duplicate positions on the same side of the split (unit-tested).

cargoTest.result: PASS, 0 failed (87 lib tests incl. 12 new in simple_corpus.rs; train_patterns_v3/t090_distillation/wthor_lines/real_data suites unmodified and green)

E1_egaroucid4431504_3seed.wallTimeApprox: ~8 minutes total for 3 seeds in one process (corpus scanned once; seed-to-seed checkpoint gaps ~2.5 min each)

E2_egaroucid8000000_1seed_reference.wallTimeApprox: ~15-20 minutes, single seed, well under the 45-minute cap
E2_egaroucid8000000_1seed_reference.note: Single-seed reference point per the task's '1 run' scope for E2; directionally consistent with 'more data reduces overfitting under train_patterns_v3's fixed 20-epoch schedule' but still past the 1.3 pre-registered threshold, not statistically robust on its own (n=1 seed).

preRegisteredInterpretation.rule: E1 3-seed mean <=1.0 -> propose game-play gate. 1.1-1.3 -> comparable, consider scaling (E2/full). >1.3 -> production trainer still favors WTHOR data; shelve data route, pivot to MPC.

discussion.counterIntuitiveFinding: T154 isolated the trainer (not the data) as the dominant gap between t090_distillation.rs and train_patterns_v3 on WTHOR data (1.5000 vs 1.1111). The natural follow-up hypothesis -- that Egaroucid data would also do well on train_patterns_v3 -- is falsified by this task: Egaroucid-on-train_patterns_v3 (1.5556) is worse than Egaroucid-on-t090_distillation.rs (1.2333), the reverse of the WTHOR-data direction.
discussion.leadingHypothesis: train_patterns_v3's fixed, unconditional 20-epoch schedule (no early stopping) likely overfits Egaroucid's smoother/faster-converging teacher signal, whereas t090_distillation.rs's validation-loss-driven early stopping (T154 Run B stopped at best_epoch=42 of a 60-epoch budget) avoids this. E2's improvement at 2x pool size (1.3667 vs E1's 1.5556) is directionally consistent with this (more distinct positions per fixed gradient-step budget slows memorization) but is not a controlled test (no epoch-count variation or early-stopping addition was run in this task, per scope).
discussion.recommendedFollowUp: Out of scope for T155: if Egaroucid data is revisited, try early stopping or a smaller fixed epoch count within train_patterns_v3 before trying more data or more seeds at epochs=20.

scopeNote: No game-play gate, no production wiring, no full 25.5M-record training, and no changes to t090_distillation.rs or train_data.rs were performed. app/ and engine/ are unchanged. train/data/t155/ (pools, checkpoints, weights, oracle outputs) is not committed (existing train/data/ gitignore rule).
